name: kiro-code-profiler
description: Profile code energy use, measure its carbon footprint, and use AI to make it greener — all inside your IDE.

editor/context.when: resourceLangId == javascript || resourceLangId == typescript || resourceLangId == python

kiro-profiler.ramAlertThresholdMb.description: RAM usage threshold in MB above which an alert is triggered during monitoring.

kiro-profiler.cpuAlertThresholdPercent.description: CPU usage threshold (0–100) above which an alert is triggered during monitoring.

kiro-profiler.sampleIntervalMs.description: Interval in milliseconds between metric samples. Minimum value is 100 ms.

kiro-profiler.runtimePaths.node.description: Path to the Node.js executable. Leave empty to use the system default.

kiro-profiler.runtimePaths.python.description: Path to the Python executable. Leave empty to use the system default.

kiro-profiler.openaiApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API key used for LLM optimization (`gpt-4o-mini`). Keep this private — do not commit your settings to source control.

kiro-profiler.carbonBudgetGramsPerYear.markdownDescription: **Ethics Gate:** Maximum projected annual CO₂ (grams) allowed per profiled run at 100 executions/day. Set to `0` to disable. When exceeded, the dashboard shows a violation and a warning notification fires — the Ethics Logic Gate in action.

scripts.package: npm run copy-assets && npm run bundle && vsce package --allow-missing-repository
